name: Avaya Experience Platform API
what_it_does: Avaya Experience Platform (AXP) REST API for enterprise omnichannel contact center. Enables AI agents to query interaction data, retrieve analytics, manage agent workflows, and access workforce engagement data. Avaya is a legacy enterprise UC/CC vendor transitioning to cloud-native AXP.
use_cases: Querying contact center interaction history and metrics from CX analytics agents
Retrieving agent performance and workforce engagement data from HR automation agents
Accessing queue and routing analytics from contact center optimization agents
Integrating Avaya communication data into enterprise BI and reporting agents
not_for: Small teams without enterprise communication infrastructure
best_when: An enterprise running Avaya Experience Platform wants AI agents to surface contact center analytics, automate WFE data flows, and integrate CX insights into operational workflows.
avoid_when: You don't have Avaya — it's expensive enterprise CCaaS/UCaaS with complex licensing. PRIVACY: Customer interaction data is highly sensitive.

auth.notes: Avaya Experience Platform OAuth 2.0. Application registration on Avaya Developer Portal. Enterprise tenant-scoped access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per agent/user pricing with multiple product bundles
pricing.notes: Enterprise UCaaS/CCaaS platform. API access included with AXP subscription. Significant investment.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by API module and plan

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer interaction recordings and transcripts are highly sensitive
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API integration required
Avaya has complex product history — AXP is the current cloud platform; legacy APIs differ
Developer portal documentation varies in quality across product lines
Enterprise-only access — developer sandbox availability limited
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer interaction data across voice and digital channels. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 enterprise auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise CCaaS with sensitive customer interaction data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2.
